# [network-request] FlexOffers

**Network name:** FlexOffers

**Slug:** `flexoffers`

**Publisher dashboard URL:** https://publisher.flexoffers.com/

**API documentation URL:** https://developer.flexoffers.com/

**Account requirements:** Active FlexOffers publisher account. API key is
issued on request via the publisher's account manager; turnaround is
typically a few business days.

**Why this is useful for publishers:** Large US/UK network with sub-affiliate
support and a long tail of merchants that do not appear on the other four
bundled networks. REST API is documented and stable enough to target.
